prestazioni: Engine swap to a VW EA111 1.6L TSI (CWVA) with a Garrett GT2259S turbocharger, upgraded fuel system with Bosch 350LPH high-flow fuel pump and Siemens Deka 60lb/hr injectors, custom ECU remap via APR Stage 2+ software with 93 octane tune targeting 220HP and 250Nm torque
KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping and 30mm drop, paired with H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars for reduced body roll on the PQ24 platform
Brembo 4-piston front calipers with 288mm vented rotors (from VW Polo GTI 6R) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, along with stainless steel braided brake lines for improved pedal feel and heat dissipation
estetica: Rocket Bunny PQ24 widebody kit with custom front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 215/40R17 tires on OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (7.5J ET35)
Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and side skirts, paired with VW Motorsport GTI-style LED taillights and Hella Dynamic turn signals
Interior overhaul with Recaro SR-7 racing seats (VW CrossFox-specific mounting brackets), MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and custom Alcantara door cards with red stitching
